title: Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital launches new advanced eye care hospital in Guduvanchery, Chennai
summary: Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital, one of India’s largest and most trusted eye care chains, has inaugurated its new state-of-the-art eye hospital in Guduvanchery, the emerging suburb of Chennai, marking a significant milestone in strengthening access to advan

contentHtml:
Equipped with modern diagnostic and surgical technology, the facility aims to deliver comprehensive and accessible eye care, in this fast developing suburb of Chennai

Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital, one of India’s largest and most trusted eye care chains, has inaugurated its new state-of-the-art eye hospital in Guduvanchery, the emerging suburb of Chennai, marking a significant milestone in strengthening access to advanced eye care. This is the 89th hospital of the group in the state of Tamilnadu.

The 12,000 sq. ft. facility is designed to deliver comprehensive eye care services in a patient-centric environment. It is equipped with Advanced Modular Operation Theatres, cutting-edge diagnostic equipment, a fully integrated opticals and pharmacy section, in a thoughtfully designed calm and serene ambience to enhance patient comfort. A key highlight of the hospital is its Viewing Gallery, which enables patients and caregivers to experience confidence in every step of the treatment process. The clinical team will be led by Dr Arjun D, Senior Ophthalmologist, supported by experienced specialists across cataract, glaucoma, retina, cornea, refractive, and oculoplastic services.

As part of the launch initiative, the hospital is offering free eye consultations until 31st July 2026, encouraging early detection and timely treatment. To register for Free Comprehensive Eye Checkup, patients can contact: 9594901452.

The facility was inaugurated by Dr Athiya Agarwal, Director – Dr Agarwals Group of Eye Hospitals. Present in the event were the senior leadership from Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital, including Dr. Srinivasan G Rao, Regional Head – Clinical Services, Dr Kaladevi Sathish, Zonal Head – Clinical Sevices, and Mr. Nandha Kumar, Senior Vice President – Operations.

Speaking on the occasion, Dr Athiya Agarwal, Director, said “This state-of-the-art facility reflects our continued mission to expand high-quality eye care across the length and breadth of our country. With advanced infrastructure, modern diagnostics, and a strong clinical team led by Dr Arjun D, we are committed to delivering comprehensive, transparent, and patient-centric care while promoting preventive eye health.”

Dr Srinivasan G Rao, Regional Head – Clinical Services, said “We are delighted with the launch of Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital in Guduvanchery, as it brings advanced eye care closer to the people of the suburbs of Chennai. Chennai is aptly named the ‘Healthcare Capital of India’, and this facility, right at the entrance to Chennai, further strengthens that ecosystem by combining advanced medical technology with patient-focused care and early intervention.”
